message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "BileMo API" as BileMoAPI
participant "BileMo Database" as BileMoDB

User ->> BileMoAPI : 1 Authentication Request (email, plain password)

BileMoAPI -> BileMoDB : 2 Find user with matching email & password combination

alt [invalid credentials]
    BileMoDB --> BileMoAPI : 3 null
    BileMoAPI --> User : 4 JSON Authentication response: 401 Invalid credentials
end

alt [valid credentials]
    BileMoDB --> BileMoAPI : 5 User object
    BileMoAPI --> User : 6 JSON Authentication Response: 200 JWT token
    BileMoAPI -> BileMoAPI : 7 Show products list (JWT token)
    BileMoAPI --> User : 8 Check route & query parameters are valid
end

alt [Route does not exist]
    BileMoAPI --> User : 9 404 Route not found
end

alt [Route found]
    BileMoAPI --> BileMoAPI : 10 Security firewall: check token is valid & user permissions
end

alt [Access denied]
    BileMoAPI --> User : 11 403 Forbidden
    alt [Token expired]
        BileMoAPI --> User : 12 401 Unauthorized
    end

    alt [Token valid & permission granted]
        BileMoAPI -> BileMoDB : 13 Get products results
        BileMoDB --> BileMoAPI : 14 Results query response (Products object)
        BileMoAPI --> User : 15 Serialize(normalize+encode) results object to JSON
        BileMoAPI --> User : 16 Response 200 Serialized JSON results
    end
end

@enduml
